73     def _build_regex(self, token="$", sort=True):
74         # retrieves the complete set of configuration values with the
75         # regex suffix so that they are going to be used for the creation
76         # of the regex rules (as expected)
77         linked = netius.conf_suffix("_REGEX")
78 
79         # retrieves the complete set of names from the linked items and then
80         # in case the sort flag is set sorts their values (proper order)
81         names = netius.legacy.keys(linked)
82         if sort:
83             names.sort()
84 
85         # iterates over the complete set of linked regex values splitting
86         # the values around the proper token and adding them to the regex
87         for name in names:
88             value = linked[name]
89             value_s = value.split(token, 1)
90             if not len(value_s) == 2:
91                 continue
92             regex, target = value_s
93             if not self._valid_url(target):
94                 continue
95             rule = (re.compile(regex), target)
96             self.regex.append(rule)
97
